title: New NTSB Report Into Deadly China Eastern Crash Suggests Struggle in Cockpit
summary_full: A report by the U.S. National Transportation Safety Board offers new details about the China Eastern Airlines crash in 2022, which killed all 132 people on board.
summary_public: A report by the U.S. National Transportation Safety Board offers new details about the China Eastern Airlines crash in 2022, which killed all 132 people on board.
